items.summary: Rubric-gate runs can make real stage progress while packages/codex:getV3CampaignSnapshot degrades the cohort to stalled_recoverable because process_observability freshness lags behind long-running rubric stages.
items.needed_to_answer: Is the rubric-gate cohort actually stalled, or are we misclassifying healthy long-running runs due to stale projection updates?
items.recommended_fix: Refresh process_observability during long rubric stages and/or relax stale_projection classification when artifact counts or direct Temporal inspection show active progress.

items.summary: Window collection and semantic transforms still share one process/data model, which limits future model-specific cleaning and collection-vs-transform gating.
items.needed_to_answer: Do we need a separate raw evidence process before the next scientific-surface expansion beyond the corrected V3 matrix?
items.recommended_fix: After the first Temporal-native pilot loop is stable, split raw collection from semantic view generation and make pipeline identity first-class.
